content.json:
# Stocky Observability Dashboard
This workbook provides an operational view of API, Web MVC, MCP, and App Gateway load and performance.

Connected Application Insights:
- __APPINSIGHTS_NAME__

Tracked resources:
- API: __API_APP_NAME__
- Web MVC: __WEBMVC_APP_NAME__
- MCP: __MCP_APP_NAME__
- App Gateway: __APPGATEWAY_NAME__

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.APP'
| where Resource in ('__API_APP_NAME__','__WEBMVC_APP_NAME__','__MCP_APP_NAME__')
| where MetricName == 'Requests'
| summarize Requests = sum(Total) by Resource, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Container Apps Requests (5m)

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.APP'
| where Resource in ('__API_APP_NAME__','__WEBMVC_APP_NAME__','__MCP_APP_NAME__')
| where MetricName == 'ResponseTime'
| summarize AvgResponseTime = avg(Average) by Resource, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Container Apps Response Time (5m avg)

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.APP'
| where Resource in ('__API_APP_NAME__','__WEBMVC_APP_NAME__','__MCP_APP_NAME__')
| where MetricName in ('CpuPercentage','MemoryPercentage')
| summarize AvgValue = avg(Average), MaxValue = max(Maximum) by Resource, MetricName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Container Apps CPU/Memory Saturation

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK'
| where Resource == '__APPGATEWAY_NAME__'
| where MetricName in ('TotalRequests','FailedRequests','CurrentConnections','UnhealthyHostCount')
| summarize Total=sum(Total), Peak=max(Maximum), Avg=avg(Average) by MetricName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Application Gateway Load and Health

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize Requests=count(), Failed=countif(success == false), P50=percentile(duration, 50), P95=percentile(duration, 95) by cloud_RoleName
| order by Requests desc
content.title: APM Requests by Role (App Insights)
